headline: KKR Commits $1.4 Billion to Aircraft Leasing with Altavair
summary: NEW YORK & SEATTLE, June 17, 2026--KKR, a leading global investment firm, and Altavair, a leader in commercial aviation leasing and financing, today announced that KKR is making a $1.4 billion equity commitment to continue expanding its global portfolio of leased commercial aircraft in partnership with Altavair. The latest commitment builds on two prior aircraft leasing portfolios created in partnership with Altavair. The investment will primarily come from KKR’s Infrastructure and Asset-Based F
